metadata.name: test
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Fernmoor to break the spell.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Fernmoor
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

key_dungeons.name: Ruined Grotto
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Ruined Grotto gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Ruined Grotto for the Bronze Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
